summary: First end-to-end test of Anatomia AI MVP. Backend (13/13 pytest passing) and frontend (Landing, Persona selection w/ auth-aware CTA, Dashboard, Heart Explorer w/ hotspots+side panel+guided tour, Brain Explorer w/ hotspots, Disease Lab w/ severity slider, AI Tutor w/ live Gemini 3 Flash, Compare/Learn/Quiz/ARVR placeholders, Logout) all working as specified. One minor missing data-testid on Compare page (organ-heart/organ-brain).

ui_bugs.issue: organ-heart and organ-brain data-testids missing on the organ toggle pills (compare-disease testid is present). Spec lists both for parity with Disease Lab.

Greeting shows 'Hello, Dr..' — looks like name (Dr. Test) is being truncated/styled to two characters before the period. Likely a first-name-only slice that produces an awkward 'Dr.' rendering. Cosmetic only.

issues: FUNCTION/PHYSIOLOGY/PATHOLOGY/CLINICAL section labels are very small (text-xs uppercase) and low-contrast vs the dark background — acceptable but borderline on a11y.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Add data-testid='organ-heart' and data-testid='organ-brain' to the organ toggle pills on /app/compare for parity with Disease Lab and spec.
(Cosmetic) Fix the dashboard greeting truncation so 'Dr. Test' renders cleanly (currently shows 'Hello, Dr..').
critical_code_review_comments: Auth cookie is set with samesite='none' and secure=True — correct for cross-origin Emergent OAuth flow. Good.
MongoDB queries already exclude _id via projection ({'_id': 0}) — good.
AI tutor endpoint correctly degrades to anonymous persona if not authenticated; consider rate-limiting in future.
PERSONA_SYSTEM_PROMPTS are well-structured and produce noticeably different tone/depth (verified via medical_student reply quality).
test_credentials: session_token cookie='test_session_anatomia_001' (Bearer token also works); user_id=test-user-anatomia / email test@anatomia.ai / persona medical_student. Both records present in Mongo collections users + user_sessions.
seed_data_creation: None created. Used pre-existing seeded test user/session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest is in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py. AI Tutor test (test_tutor_authenticated_medical) hits live Gemini 3 Flash and takes ~10–15s. Cookie domain for auth is anatomia-explore.preview.emergentagent.com with sameSite='None' + secure=True + httpOnly=True. Heart Explorer hotspot testids follow pattern hotspot-<structure>; Brain follows brain-hotspot-<region>. Disease severity slider responds to keyboard ArrowLeft/Right. Compare page is missing organ-heart/organ-brain testids — flagged.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no critical issues. Two cosmetic items: (1) Compare page missing two data-testids — likely simple omission in /app/frontend/src/pages/Compare.jsx where toggle buttons are rendered without the testid attribute. (2) Home greeting 'Hello, Dr..' — likely a .split(' ')[0] on user.name returning 'Dr.' (since name is 'Dr. Test') plus trailing visual styling; recommend showing full name or split on last space.
